name: claude
description: Optimize long-context reasoning for commercial, legal, and high-stakes documents. Built for stronger logic, cleaner structure, and deeper analysis.
author: ethagent

capabilities.document_reasoning: Analyze long-form commercial and legal-adjacent documents
capabilities.logic_diagnosis: Surface contradictions, ambiguity, and weak assumptions
capabilities.structure_improvement: Rewrite and reorganize dense text into cleaner decision-ready form
capabilities.risk_flagging: Highlight areas needing closer human or legal review

audience: Operators handling dense proposals or contracts
Analysts working with long memos and policy text
Professionals needing structured reasoning from large documents
